step_rationale: Acute-phase response marker; growth factor regulation; systemic rather than atherothrombotic-cascade-specific.
mechanism: IGFBP4 elevation in acute MI reflects systemic inflammatory and metabolic stress response independent of plaque rupture mechanisms.

references.title: A Proteomics-Based Approach for Prediction of Different Cardiovascular Diseases and Dementia.
Novel Insights Into the Effects of Interleukin 6 Antagonism in Non-ST-Segment-Elevation Myocardial Infarction Employing the SOMAscan Proteomics Platform.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
